title: Carnivoluem
body:
## Ready to Attend the Party of a Lifetime?
## Well now you can with Carnivoluem!
This Mod was made for Lavender Valley by TheTaciturnOne, and was commissioned by WhaleTV

**Carnivoluem adds a plentiful of fun new items such as:**

**Cloth Blocks:**
![Cloth Blocks come in Blocks, Stairs and Slabs and in all 16 colours!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16256709c12de32fa4532b58dd9a4dacc1fe9db9.png)

**Various Gummys:**
![All the Gummys, a pretty bad food source that tastes as bad as it feels to eat...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33c52beff2ded18ad68b8ee71e08264744d2afb.png)

**Other Foods:**
![Sugar Cubes, Chocolate Oranges and Popcorn!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81aab47edabe01546db27042c5cd255391e10424.png)

**Balloons:**
![Balloons come in all colours and can be used for Parkour, Decoration or just to heal that inner childhood!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e98394a2c467b4c4698ee418ad87f3800ecc2a9_0.webp)

**Confetti Cannon:**
![Drops Confetti all over!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55e353f203a93adecbca74b851d8c827b84e8dbe.png)

**Red Panda Mask:**
![Red Panda Mask on WhaleTV's Skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5640b65d8097e9ee5db9a2bde30dc51aaac4bcc6.png)

![You can move the mask to fit YOUR face shape!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65ca6a5a058b33a4fb66920d35842dcd3040669c.png)

**Resonating Blade:**
![WhaleTV Holding the Resonating Blade, A weapon made to take down the Dictator on Lavender Valley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da477b6c65130c10c2deaa0a0eb596509a39d005.png)

**Dissosciating:**
![Disassociating, The First Enchantment for the Resonating Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2985179b925ff38d7cf56f6d7edb4a3d5dbb6e11.png)

**Soundwave:**
![Soundwave, The Second Enchantment for the Resonating Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/703986925d3d08d6a6543bd7ac4947b425ccc024.png)
